options.name: -def
options.description: Specifies the name of the DEF file that EDI system uses to compare with the design

options.name: -logical
options.description: Compares the netlists for logical equivalence

options.name: -outfile
options.description: Specifies the file name that contains the differences between the specified DEF file and the design in the database

options.name: -outputPhysicalInstInFile
options.description: <physicalInstFile> When this option is specified, physical instance eco command is also written to eco file, and dump added physical instances name one per line to <physicalInstFile>

options.name: -referenceData
options.description: Specifies the data from where the post-ECO netlist is to be compared. inMemory: Compares the post-ECO netlist to the netlist in memory. external: Compares the post-ECO netlist to an external netlist. default: inMemory
